libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/runtime execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, set system properties `sun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `io.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` as native runtime args. Tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server on loopback for WebClient requests, JSON, forms, multipart upload, redirects, sessions, and caching; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If the existing version-gated runtimeArgs remain restricted to 5.0.0, 5.0.1 native-image run can fail despite adequate generated coverage because Vert.x 5.0.1 pulls Netty 4.2.2.Final.
OAuth2WebClient depends on optional Vert.x OAuth2 support; avoid making OAuth2 the core coverage path unless adding an explicit test dependency is intentional.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x, so the same Java 25 native-image runtime system properties already used for 5.0.0 are needed for meaningful native-run coverage.
